mapper.select:
SELECT
s.register_id AS "registerId",
s.visit_date AS "visitDate",
s.diagnosis_summary AS "diagnosisSummary",
s.professional_metrics AS "professionalMetrics",
s.doctor_name AS "doctorName",
s.department_name AS "departmentName",
s.source_medical_record_id AS "sourceMedicalRecordId",
s.prescription_summary AS "prescriptionSummary",
s.chief_complaint AS "chiefComplaint",
s.treatment_advice AS "treatmentAdvice",
s.lab_panel AS "labPanel",
s.updated_at AS "updatedAt"
FROM follow_up_last_visit_snapshot s
WHERE s.register_id = #{registerId}

SELECT
l.metric_code AS "metricCode",
l.label AS "label",
l.metric_value AS "metricValue",
l.unit AS "unit",
l.ref_range AS "refRange",
l.abnormal_flag AS "abnormalFlag",
l.sort_order AS "sortOrder"
FROM follow_up_last_visit_lab_item l
WHERE l.register_id = #{registerId}
ORDER BY l.sort_order ASC, l.id ASC
